title: Add shared namespace support
body:
Add support for shared namespaces in Libpod. A container may depend upon the namespaces of another container, sharing them. This is the foundation for pods.

Remove existing podman support for shared namespaces in favor of libpod support.

Still needs BATS tests for podman changes.

comments.body: I think I broke the parsing for --net with this. Will investigate further on monday, but I would hold off on merging until I can look into it more.

Rebased on top of #225 - do not merge until #225 is also merged

Still investigating --net parsing issues
--net parsing is also broken on master. Will open an issue and look into fixing seperately
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 2e48c60) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
There are preexisting IPC and PID tests. I'm not if there's an easy way to test shared network namespaces. This should be good to merge.
